zh.lifeSummary: 當Irmintrud von der Wetterau於0968年出生在德國貝也史瓦本時，她的父親Heribert von der Wetterau44歲，母親Irmintrud von Avalgau19歲。她於大約0985年與Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau在德國艾爾薩斯-洛斯林根結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1024年在法國德 艾斯特莫瑟勒享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Irmintrud von der Wetterau于0968年出生在德国貝也史瓦本时，她的父亲Heribert von der Wetterau44岁，母亲Irmintrud von Avalgau19岁。她于大约0985年与Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau在德国艾爾薩斯-洛斯林根结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1024年在法国德 艾斯特莫瑟勒享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Zoltan, Istvan, Janos, Lajos.
Hungarian (Dér): from the old personal name Dér of Turkic origin, or a nickname for a gray-haired man, from the vocabulary word dér ‘hoarfrost’.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 謝, see   Xie   1.

variants.name: Xie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Hong, Li, Ming, Ying, Min, Qing, Yuan, Bin, Hui, Ping, Wei, Xiaoli, Ding, Chang, Lan, Quan, Cong, Dang, Hai, Tian, Yiping.

Mandarin form of the surname 謝, meaning ‘thank’ in Chinese: (i) from Xie (謝), the name of an ancient state (possibly located in Nanyang in Henan province), annexed around the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ).Later this place was probably granted to Shen Bo (the Earl of Shen), uncle of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). After it was annexed during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (ii) adopted in place of the surname Zhi-Le (直勒) by Xie Xiaozheng (謝孝政), an official during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Wetterau
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Wetterau, the name of an area in northern Hesse.

nameMeanings.name: Irmintrud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Irmintrud von der Wetterau was born in 0968, in Swabia, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Heribert von der Wetterau, was 44 and her mother, Irmintrud von Avalgau, was 19. She married Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau about 0985, in Alsace-Lorraine, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1024, in Moselle, Grand Est, France, at the age of 56.

fr.Gleiberg, Giessen, Hessen, Germany: Krofdorf-Gleiberg, Wettenberg, Kreis Gießen, Hessen, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Irmintrud von der Wetterau est née en 0968, à Schwaben, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Heribert von der Wetterau, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Irmintrud von Avalgau, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau environ 0985, à Alsace-Lorraine, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1024, à Moselle, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.Gleiberg, Giessen, Hessen, Germany: Krofdorf-Gleiberg, Wettenberg, Kreis Gießen, Hessen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Irmintrud von der Wetterau 0968 in Schwaben, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heribert von der Wetterau 44 und ihre Mutter Irmintrud von Avalgau 19. Sie hat um 0985 in Elsaß-Lothringen, Deutschland Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1024 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Irmintrud von der Wetterau è nata il nel 0968 nel Schwaben, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Heribert von der Wetterau, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Irmintrud von Avalgau, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau circa 0985, nel Elsaß-Lothringen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1024, nel Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Irmintrud von der Wetterauが0968年にドイツバイエルンスチワベンで生まれた時，父Heribert von der Wetterauは44歳，母Irmintrud von Avalgauは19歳であった。約0985年にドイツエルサss-ロスリンジェンでFriedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgauと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1024年にフランスグランド エストモセルで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Irmintrud von der Wetterau(이)가 0968년 독일 베이른 슈와벤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heribert von der Wetterau(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Irmintrud von Avalgau(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 0985년 독일 엘사ss-로스링에서 Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1024년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 모셀에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau aproximadamente 0985, em Elsaß-Lothringen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1024, em Moselle, Grand Est, França, com 56 anos.

ru.Gleiberg, Giessen, Hessen, Germany: крофдорф-глибирг, веттенбирг, крис гиеssен, Гессен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Irmintrud von der Wetterau родилась в 0968 г. в местности щвабен, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Heribert von der Wetterau было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Irmintrud von Avalgau, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau около 0985 г. в местности элсаss-лотринген, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1024 г. в местности моселл, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 56 лет.

Se casó con Friedrich von Luxemburg Graf im Moselgau aproximadamente 0985, en Elsaß-Lothringen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1024, en Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, a la edad de 56 años.
